---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed API / behavior

If you have a concrete idea for the interface, show it here:

```python
# Example of how you'd like to use it
from hypergrid import ...
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you have thought about, and why they are less suitable.

## Additional context

References, related issues, papers, or any other context that supports the request.
